title: npm on Android — Package Management Guide | Acode
description: Use npm on your Android phone with Acode. Install packages, run scripts, manage dependencies through the Alpine Linux terminal. Full npm workflow on mobile. Complete setup guide.
heroHeadline: Use npm on Your Android Phone
heroSubheadline: Acode lets you use npm natively on Android through its Alpine Linux terminal. Install packages, run scripts, manage dependencies — the full npm workflow on your phone.
problemPoints: npm is the world's largest package registry — but it's a command-line tool. No Android code editor can run npm commands. You can write JavaScript but can never install or manage packages.
Web development without npm is like cooking without ingredients. You can write imports but never resolve dependencies. No npm install. No node_modules. No build scripts.
solutionPoints: Install npm alongside Node.js in Acode's terminal: apk add nodejs npm. npm is now running natively on your Android phone.
Use every npm command: npm init, npm install, npm run, npm publish, npm update, npm audit. It all works exactly as it does on desktop.
npx also works: npx create-react-app my-app, npx eslint ., npx prettier --write .. Run tools without installing them globally.

features.title: Package Installation
features.description: npm install express, npm install -D typescript. Install any npm package. Dependencies download to your phone's storage.

features.title: npm Scripts
features.description: Run build processes, tests, and automation via package.json scripts. npm run build, npm test, npm run lint.

features.title: npx for One-Off Tools
features.description: Use npx to run CLI tools without installing them. Scaffold projects, run linters, format code — all from the terminal.

features.title: package.json Management
features.description: Edit package.json in Acode's editor with JSON syntax highlighting. Manage dependencies, scripts, and configs visually.

faqs.question: Do all npm packages work on Acode?
faqs.answer: Most do. Pure JavaScript packages work universally. Packages with native C++ addons need Alpine Linux-compatible binaries — most popular packages support this.

faqs.question: Can I publish npm packages from Acode?
faqs.answer: Yes. Authenticate with npm login and publish with npm publish. Full npm publishing workflow on Android.
